name: B. Zuka
description:
ु : B. ZUKA, commonly referred to as Zuka, is the shopkeeper of the Phighting world. Calm and somewhat aloof, he's very careful when it comes to choosing his words. He's a father, makng him a gentle giant at heart, even when he's upset about the actions of a particular phighter. ( icon - .murathefool on twitter ! )
